_comment: Active Profile shape. PUT this to /api/profile (or edit in the UI) to map the abstract Requirement/Epic/Task/Milestone model onto YOUR Jira. The acceptanceCriteria source is the load-bearing setting (open question O1): tell the tool where your criteria live.
